title: rosa × dumetorum subsp. tuberculata
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subsp. tuberculata, also known as the rough-leaved wild rose or prickly rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa dumetorum plant, which is a member of the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subsp. tuberculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although its specific uses and preparations may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
